title: ajuga genevensis var. foliosa
intro: Ajuga genevensis var. foliosa, also known as Bugle, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ajuga genevensis var. foliosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
